summary: Comprehensive responsive design testing for UAE e-commerce platform at three viewports: Mobile (375px), Tablet (768px), and Desktop (1920px). All major responsive features working correctly. One minor issue found: phone number shows 'Call' on all screen sizes due to undefined 'xs' breakpoint in Tailwind config.

ui_bugs.issue: Phone number shows 'Call' on all screen sizes instead of full number (+971 4 456 7890) on larger screens
ui_bugs.root_cause: Header.js uses 'xs:hidden' and 'hidden xs:inline' classes but 'xs' breakpoint is NOT defined in tailwind.config.js
ui_bugs.fix: Either add 'xs' breakpoint to tailwind.config.js OR change to use 'sm' breakpoint: 'hidden sm:inline' and 'sm:hidden'

passed_tests: Mobile (375px) - Hamburger menu button visible and functional
Mobile (375px) - Top bar shows 'Call' and 'Free Delivery 500+' text
Mobile (375px) - Logo subtext 'GENERAL TRADING L.L.C' correctly hidden
Mobile (375px) - Hero section displays title, subtitle, and buttons
Mobile (375px) - Shop Now and Contact Us buttons visible and responsive
Mobile (375px) - Product grid shows 2 columns
Mobile (375px) - Mobile menu opens with all navigation items (Home, All Products, Categories, Contact Us, Login, Register)
Mobile (375px) - Cart page displays properly with stacked layout
Mobile (375px) - Account page stacks sidebar and content vertically
Tablet (768px) - Full navigation visible (hamburger menu hidden)
Tablet (768px) - 'All Categories' mega menu accessible
Tablet (768px) - Hero section scales correctly
Tablet (768px) - Product grid shows 3 columns
Tablet (768px) - Search bar visible
Tablet (768px) - Get Quote button visible
Desktop (1920px) - All header elements display correctly
Desktop (1920px) - Email and location visible in top bar
Desktop (1920px) - Logo with subtext 'GENERAL TRADING L.L.C' visible
Desktop (1920px) - Full search bar visible
Desktop (1920px) - Hero section height ~600px
Desktop (1920px) - Product grid shows 4 columns
Desktop (1920px) - Account page shows sidebar and content side by side
Cart page responsive at all viewports - items and order summary display correctly
action_items: Fix phone number display: Add 'xs' breakpoint to tailwind.config.js OR change Header.js line 246 to use 'sm' breakpoint instead of 'xs'
critical_code_review_comments: Hero section responsive classes (h-[400px] sm:h-[500px] md:h-[600px]) working correctly
Button sizes responsive with sm/md breakpoints (h-10 sm:h-14 px-6 sm:px-10)
Product grid uses correct responsive classes (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4)
Account page grid (lg:grid-cols-4) correctly stacks on mobile and shows sidebar on desktop
Mobile menu Sheet component properly implemented with all navigation items
Header.js uses undefined 'xs' breakpoint - should use 'sm' instead
context_for_next_testing_agent: Responsive design testing complete. All major responsive features working correctly at Mobile (375px), Tablet (768px), and Desktop (1920px). One minor issue: phone number in top bar shows 'Call' on all screen sizes due to undefined 'xs' breakpoint in Tailwind config. Fix is simple: either add xs breakpoint or change to sm breakpoint.

top_bar_phone.expected: Show 'Call' on mobile, full number on larger screens
